explorations_completed.goal_summary: H^1-BMO duality route (Branch 2B) + atomic decomposition (Branch 2C partial)
explorations_completed.key_finding: DEAD END: W^{1,2} doesn't embed in BMO (need W^{1,3}), global H^1 = fixed constant, localization destroys H^1. Even with W^{1,3}, Hölder beats H^1-BMO.
DEAD END: Complex interpolation gives p_θ < 4/3 (weaker), global E_0 bound persists, ψ_k ≥ 0 wastes atomic cancellation. W^{1,3} universality confirmed.
